---
title: "Projects"
title-meta: "Projects | Pierpaolo Vendittelli"
description: "Selected projects by Pierpaolo Vendittelli across medical AI, digital pathology, LLM agents, and applied machine learning systems."
toc: false
---

<div id="projects-root"></div>

```{=html}
<script type="module" src="assets/js/pages/projects.js"></script>
```
